final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed technical infographic of a Sony A7 camera showing a full exploded-view decomposition with all parts labeled by name.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded-view diagram in the style of a precision engineering manual, flat vector with subtle depth cues
Composition: centered exploded-view layout, isometric or slight 3/4 angle, all components spread outward from the camera body with leader lines pointing to each part
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera fully disassembled into individual components — including body shell, sensor unit, shutter mechanism, mirror box, battery compartment, card slot, lens mount, viewfinder assembly, LCD screen, control dials, buttons, grip, and internal circuit boards
Scene/backdrop: clean white or very light neutral background to maximize label legibility
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, no shadows, technical clarity over mood
Color palette: neutral grays and blacks for components, with accent color (e.g. Sony orange or blue) used for leader lines and labels; white background
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: every visible component must have a labeled callout line with its part name in English; layout must remain legible at poster size; no overlapping labels
Avoid: photorealistic rendering that obscures part boundaries, decorative gradients, lens flare, dark backgrounds, missing labels, generic camera silhouette without detail
